projects.name: Genius Platform (VERSES AI)
projects.description: AI platform using active inference (Karl Friston's Free Energy Principle) to create context-aware AI systems. Demonstrated cross-platform digital twin interoperability with NASA JPL for lunar rover simulation.

projects.name: IEEE P2874 Spatial Web Standards
projects.description: Open IEEE standards for the Spatial Web including HSML (Hyperspatial Modeling Language) and HSTP (Hyperspatial Transaction Protocol). Standardized May 2025. Makes physical space programmable.

projects.name: Smart Covenants
projects.description: Platform leveraging smart contracts and distributed ledgers to democratise public investment and recapture land value uplift generated by sustainable infrastructure. Developed with EIT Climate-KIC.

projects.name: Self-Owning Nature Trusts
projects.description: Alternative property configuration enabling nature to buy ownerless land for ecosystem preservation. Part of Dark Matter Labs' Property & Beyond lab.

people.skills: Spatial computing, AI governance, IEEE standards, active inference
people.notes: Champion of IEEE P2874 Spatial Web Standards. Publicly traded company (CBOE: VERS).

people.skills: Institutional design, alternative ownership, property law, smart covenants, systems change
people.notes: Key figure in 21st-century institutional prototyping. Dark Matter Labs has Swedish node (Mork Materia Laboratoriet AB).
